steps.title: Identify the height signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the consequence clause: “so high that Gogol must tip his head back in order to see.” This directly shows the kite is moving upward to a significant height.

steps.title: Match the upward motion
steps.content:
“Raise” here means to lift or move something upward.

The passage shows the kite being lifted so high that Gogol must look up—clearly the upward motion that lift describes.

The other choices describe entirely different actions that don't fit.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
